title: Dunaújváros, Fejér — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dunaújváros, Fejér: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dunaújváros is a city in Fejér with a population of 42,500. A planned industrial city on the Danube, built in the 1950s as Hungary’s first socialist city, known for its steel works and modernist architecture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
